title: My
subtitle: Practical articles on AI engineering, LLM systems, and production ML — written from real project experience.

items.title: Building Production RAG Pipelines with LangChain
items.excerpt: A deep-dive into architecting production-grade RAG systems — covering chunking strategies, embedding selection, FAISS vs. Pinecone trade-offs, re-ranking, and the specific patterns that took a client system from 60% to 91% answer accuracy.

items.title: Agentic AI: From Simple Chains to Autonomous Agents
items.excerpt: A practitioner's guide to crossing the gap between basic LLM chains and production autonomous agents — covering ReAct, tool selection, memory architectures, failure modes, and lessons from real deployments using LangGraph and AutoGen.
